items: Welcome by the School Board President, María Díaz-Slocum
Additions, Deletions or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Measure T Bond Program Tracking List of Items Under $20k
Approval of Project Inspector Agreement Amendment #11 for Orion Alternative (Formerly John Gill) and Taft Community School with Inspectacon
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 3516 - Emergencies and Disaster Preparedness Plan
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 4030 - Nondiscrimination in Employment
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 4118 - Dismissal/Suspension/Disciplinary Action - Certificated Employees
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 4218 - Dismissal/Suspension/Disciplinary Action - Classified Employees
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 4119.11_4219.11_4319.11 - Sexual Harassment
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5145.7 - Sexual Harassment
First Reading and Discussion of Board Bylaw 9320 - Meetings and Notices
Approval of Extension of the Agreement for Food Service Management between Sodexo America, LLC and Redwood City School District for Fiscal Year 2022-23
Ratification of Warrant Register, March 1, 2022 - March 31, 2022
Approval of Adoption of Mandarin Immersion Language Arts Materials
Approval of Addendum to Measure U Application for 2021-22 School Year for Roy Cloud School
Adoption of Resolution 31, Authorizing Electronic Meetings of the Board of Trustees During a State of Emergency Pursuant to Government Code Section 54953(e)
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Agenda Schedule

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 9.2 (Sodexo Food Service Agreement) moved from consent to action. Items 10.1 (Mandarin Immersion Materials) and 10.2 (Addendum to Measure U Application) moved to consent.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move the consent items? So moved. Second. All in favor? Aye.
